top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'weekly' 
  AND c.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'weekly' 
  AND c.gender = 'M';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';

FROM client

WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';

FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'weekly' 
  AND c.gender = 'M';

JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND account.frequency = 'weekly';
